## Skill name

```text
paste skill name here
```

## Where is it installed?

Example: `~/.codex/skills/my-skill`

```text
paste path here
```

## What does Skill Sync show?

Paste the relevant part of `/skill-sync check` or `--inventory` output.

```text
paste output here
```

## Do you know the source repository?

- [ ] Yes
- [ ] No
- [ ] Not sure

If yes, paste the URL:

```text
https://github.com/owner/repo
```

## Is this skill public, private, or local-only?

- [ ] Public
- [ ] Private
- [ ] Local-only
- [ ] Not sure

## What do you want Skill Sync to do with it?

- [ ] Update it from a public GitHub source
- [ ] Mark it as local/private and always skip it
- [ ] I am not sure

## Any source line inside SKILL.md?

If the skill's `SKILL.md` mentions `Source:`, `Repository:`, `GitHub:`, or similar, paste that line here:

```text
paste source line here
```
